nodes.name: Build LinkedIn Apify Inputs
nodes.notes: Input schema for cheap_scraper/linkedin-job-scraper. Set LINKEDIN_MAX_KEYWORDS_PER_RUN low while testing cost.

nodes.name: Run Apify LinkedIn Actor
nodes.notes: Uses cheap_scraper/linkedin-job-scraper by default and returns dataset items directly.

nodes.name: Append LinkedIn Results to Google Sheet
nodes.notes: Use the same Opportunity Intelligence Ledger and Opportunities tab.

nodes.name: Create Zoho Deal LinkedIn
nodes.notes: Connect your Zoho CRM credential. This creates Deals for every LinkedIn lead; no score filter is applied yet.

parameters.content:
Apify LinkedIn MVP:
1. Build one small actor run per keyword.
2. Normalize LinkedIn job fields into the common opportunity object.
3. Score with OpenAI.
4. Append to Google Sheets.
5. Create Zoho Deals for all LinkedIn leads, no score filter yet.

main.node: Append LinkedIn Results to Google Sheet
